name: Import-PowerShellDataFile
-LiteralPath
-PSPath
-LP
options.description: The path to the file being imported. All characters in the path are treated as literal values. Wildcard characters aren't processed.

options.name: -Path
options.description: The path to the file being imported. Wildcards are allowed but only the first matching file is imported.

options.name: -SkipLimitCheck
options.description: By default `Import-PowerShellDataFile` imports only 500 keys from a `.psd1` file. Use SkipLimitCheck to import more than 500 keys.

description: Imports values from a `.PSD1` file without invoking its contents.
